'''sapaba''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yakitori|yakitori]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-p-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yakitori|yakitori]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| sapaba
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæpæbæth|sæpæbæth]] || [[word:sæpæbæj|sæpæbæj]] || [[word:sæpæbæsh|sæpæbæsh]] || [[word:sæpæbæ|sæpæbæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sapapabath|sapapabath]] || [[word:sapapabaj|sapapabaj]] || [[word:sapapabash|sapapabash]] || [[word:sapapaba|sapapaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sapabath|sapabath]] || [[word:sapabaj|sapabaj]] || [[word:sapabash|sapabash]] || [[word:sapaba|sapaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sapafbafth|sapafbafth]] || [[word:sapafbafj|sapafbafj]] || [[word:sapafbafsh|sapafbafsh]] || [[word:sapafbaf|sapafbaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sapabatha|sapabatha]] || [[word:sapabaja|sapabaja]] || [[word:sapabasha|sapabasha]] || [[word:sapabaka|sapabaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sapabath|sapabath]] || [[word:sapabaj|sapabaj]] || [[word:sapabash|sapabash]] || [[word:sapaba|sapaba]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sapabathal|sapabathal]] || [[word:sapabajal|sapabajal]] || [[word:sapabashal|sapabashal]] || [[word:sapabakal|sapabakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sapabaathatha|sapabaathatha]] || [[word:sapabaajaja|sapabaajaja]] || [[word:sapabaashasha|sapabaashasha]] || [[word:sapabaaka|sapabaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sapabathan|sapabathan]] || [[word:sapabajan|sapabajan]] || [[word:sapabashan|sapabashan]] || [[word:sapabakan|sapabakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sapabathaoro|sapabathaoro]] || [[word:sapabajaoro|sapabajaoro]] || [[word:sapabashaoro|sapabashaoro]] || [[word:sapabakaoro|sapabakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|1e8b6ef}}
